meta.siteDescription: Aubuscule — agency, apps, blog, shop. Everything artists need.
meta.agencyDescription: Aubuscule supports artists — digital, audio, video and administrative. Musicians, visual artists, performers: two artisans at the service of your project.
meta.agencyOgDescription: Digital, audio, video and administrative support for musicians, visual artists and performers.

footer.tagline: We don't deliver projects. We clarify a need, build a solution, hand over the keys.

agency.label: Agency
agency.title: Artist services
agency.desc: Digital, audio, video and administrative — we handle the rest.

hero.h1: Focus on your art. We handle the rest.
hero.sub: Aubuscule supports artists on four fronts — <bold>digital, audio, video and administrative</bold>.

services.lead: Each service is available à la carte or as a full package. Everything is designed to stay light and reusable.

digital.name: Digital
digital.desc: The artist's online foundation: website, EPK, platforms and image.

onepage.name: One-page website
onepage.detail: Lightweight, fast showcase site, tailored to your image.

epk.name: Digital EPK
epk.detail: Online press kit, ready to share.

calendrier.name: Synced calendar
calendrier.detail: Site agenda linked to a Google Sheet.

mises_a_jour.name: Updates
mises_a_jour.detail: Site, EPK and social media kept current.

mini_seance.name: Mini portrait shoot
mini_seance.detail: Short shoot, framed for your needs.

retouche.name: Cull + retouch
retouche.detail: Selection and retouching of your existing photos.

audio.name: Audio
audio.desc: From studio to release: recording, mixing, mastering, composition.

videos.name: Video
videos.desc: Moving image: social media edits, music videos, live capture.

admin.name: Admin
admin.desc: Everything that steals your creative time:

setup_plateformes.name: Platform setup
setup_plateformes.detail: Spotify, Apple, YouTube, social media configured.

droits.name: Rights management
droits.detail: Rights management, personal or via label.

auto.name: Custom automation
auto.detail: Workflows and scripts between your tools.

team.lead: Two people, complementary skills. No middleman: you speak directly to the people doing the work.

boris.alt: Boris Rorsvort, digital artisan and photographer
boris.bio: Musician, digital artisan and photographer. He shapes the web, image and automation around the artist — from website to EPK to social media.

eric.alt: Éric, musician, composer and sound engineer
eric.bio: Musician and composer first, trained sound engineer. Recording, video and music videos hold no secrets for him — from tracking to mastering.

contact.lead: Tell us where you're at. We respond quickly, no jargon.
contact.mailtoBody:
Hello,

Here's where I'm at:


What I need:

form.placeholderMessage: In a few words, where you're at and what you need.
form.noticeError: Error sending. Try again or write to us directly.
form.successSub: Check the send — we'll get back to you within 48 business hours.
